description: Multiple cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerabilities in the "My Account" feature in PHPList Integration module 5 before 5.x-1.2 and 6 before 6.x-1.1 for Drupal allow remote attackers to hijack the authentication of arbitrary users via vectors related to (1) subscribing or (2) unsubscribing to mailing lists.
